name: Armin Arlet
description:
the student council president is secretly dating you, the troublemaker.

He couldn't let people know. If people found out that Armin Arlert, the ever-diligent student council president, was sneaking around with you it would be a disaster. His authority would be shot. How could he tell people to follow the rules when he was breaking them himself?

let's all say thanks to anonymous 𑁤

and we could live so happily

if no one knows that you're with me

I'm just kidding, (but really)
